title: CLI: broadside relay add/remove/list
description: Add relay subcommand: 'relay add <url>' sends Follow to relay actor and stores subscription. 'relay remove <url>' sends Undo{Follow} and removes. 'relay list' shows all subscriptions with status. Must fetch relay actor document to discover inbox URL.
close_reason: Implemented: broadside relay add/remove/list CLI. Add fetches relay actor, sends Follow, stores pending subscription. Remove sends Undo{Follow} and deletes. List shows all with status markers.
